caption: A wide shot shows a large assembly hall with tiered seating, where numerous people are seated in rows. Many individuals are wearing light-colored, traditional Indian attire, including white kurtas and caps. The attendees are seated at long desks equipped with microphones. Some people are engaged in conversation, while others are looking toward the front of the room or reviewing documents. The scene remains static across the sequence, with only minor shifts in the posture and head movements of the people as they interact or listen. The architectural setting features wooden panels and a structured layout typical of a parliamentary or legislative chamber. No on-screen text or logos are visible in the scene.
